text: The corridors are bathed in an eerie purple-blue light, casting stark reflections and rendering everything a little unreal. I hear the distant hum of electricity and my own footsteps echo on the hard floor. The second image’s wall, painted with 'R+D' and the language of progress, reminds me of promises made about innovation and collaboration. Yet, the emptiness and quiet amplify my sense of being a solitary observer. I feel a mixture of curiosity and unease, as if I am peering into the heart of a space poised between creativity and abandonment.
